subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letter reached Me and thy festival greetings were accepted. The hope is that this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما رسید و تهنیت عید مقبول گردید امید چنانست که این
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @business; financial; property matters, @Shrines and Holy places
